docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK R. AS TO DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE VALDEZ, NESTOR DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 06 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-22-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT CLARA, MICHELLE

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR D DAVENPORT; CLK C CARSWELL 02:56PM CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF DIPAK IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT MICHELLE CLARK IS PRESENT IN PRO PER (SUED AS MICHELLE CLARA). DEFT NESTOR VALDEZ IS NOT PRESENT AND HAS NOT ANSWERED. AFTER DISCUSSIONS A STIPULATED JUDGMENT IS REACHED BETWEEN MICHELLE CLARK AND DIPAK PATEL AND STATED ON THE RECORD: - PLTF WILL HAVE POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 68-SIXTH STREET #27, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. - RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. - PLTF WAIVES ANY PAST DUE RENT OR MONEY DAMAGES. - MUTUAL WAIVER OF ANY CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER. - MS CLARK TO VACATE PREMISES BY NOON JUNE 10, 1996. - EACH WAIVES ANY CLAIMS FOR FEES OR COSTS. - MS CLARK TO LEAVE PROPTY IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION AND RETURN ANY KEYS TO MR PATEL OR HIS AGENT. BOTH STATE THEY UNDERSTAND AND AGREE TO THE SETTLEMENT. THE PLTF WILL PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. THE CASE REMAINS ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR BECAUSE DEFT VALDEZ IS NOT PART OF THIS AGREEMENT.
STIPULATED JUDGMENT REACHED AT SETTLEMENT CONF AS TO DEFT CLARA (CLARK) ONLY. TRIAL DATE OF 5/22/96 STANDS AS TO DEFT VALDEZ.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, M CLARA SETTLED. PLTF TO ENTER DEFAULT AGAINST N VALDEZ.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 3 COPIES FOR CASE NUMBER 130365. PLTF COPY. FOR PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK R.
